channel.title: Nutri Veda Products
channel.description: Premium Natural Nutrition Products - Protein Powders, Vitamins, Kids Nutrition, Weight Management, Herbal Blends

item.g:title: VedaProtein Elite Whey Protein Powder - 24g Protein, Chocolate & Vanilla, 30 Servings
item.g:description: Premium whey protein with 24g protein per scoop. Mixes instantly. Chocolate & Vanilla flavors. Ideal for muscle recovery and post-workout nutrition.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Sports Nutrition > Protein Supplements
item.g:product_type: Health & Beauty > Protein Powders > Whey Protein

item.g:title: PlantPower Vegan Protein - 20g Plant Protein, Pea & Brown Rice, Lactose-Free
item.g:description: 100% plant-based protein powder from pea and brown rice blend. 20g protein per serving. Vegan, lactose-free, no artificial colors.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Sports Nutrition > Protein Supplements
item.g:product_type: Health & Beauty > Protein Powders > Plant Protein

item.g:title: Daily Vitality Multivitamin - Vitamin D3, B12, Zinc, Iron - 60 Capsules
item.g:description: Complete daily multivitamin with Vitamin D3, B12, Zinc & Iron. Supports immunity and overall health. 60 capsules, 60-day supply.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements

item.g:title: OmegaVeda Fish Oil - 1000mg Omega-3 EPA DHA - Heart & Brain Health - 90 Softgels
item.g:description: High-strength Omega-3 fish oil with EPA & DHA. Supports heart, brain & joint health. Lemon flavored, no fishy aftertaste. 90 softgels.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements > Fish Oil
item.g:product_type: Health & Beauty > Supplements > Omega-3 Fish Oil

item.g:title: AshwaBalance Herbal Blend - Ashwagandha, Brahmi, Shatavari - Stress Relief - 60 Capsules
item.g:description: Ayurvedic herbal blend with KSM-66 Ashwagandha, Brahmi, and Shatavari. For stress relief, hormonal balance, and mental clarity. 60 veg capsules.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements > Herbal Supplements

item.g:title: TurmerCure Gold Blend - Turmeric Curcumin 95%, Black Pepper, Ginger - Immunity
item.g:description: Powerful anti-inflammatory blend with 95% curcumin extract, BioPerine black pepper for absorption, and ginger root. Immunity support.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements > Herbal Supplements

item.g:title: GrowStrong Kids NutriMix - DHA, Calcium, Iron - Ages 2-12 - Chocolate & Mango
item.g:description: Complete nutrition for kids aged 2-12. DHA for brain development, calcium, vitamin D, iron, and prebiotic fiber. Chocolate and mango flavors kids love.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements > Children's Health Supplements
item.g:product_type: Health & Beauty > Kids Nutrition > Growth Formula

item.g:title: JuniorImmune Chewables - Vitamin C, Zinc, Elderberry - Kids Immunity - 30 Tablets
item.g:description: Chewable immunity tablets with Vitamin C 250mg, Zinc, Elderberry & Echinacea. Perfect for kids' immune system support. Doctor approved formula.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements > Children's Health Supplements
item.g:product_type: Health & Beauty > Kids Nutrition > Immunity Chewables

item.g:title: Casein NightRecovery - 25g Micellar Casein Protein - Overnight Muscle Recovery
item.g:description: Slow-release micellar casein protein for overnight muscle recovery. 25g protein per serving. Rich chocolate flavor. Ideal for night-time nutrition.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Sports Nutrition > Protein Supplements
item.g:product_type: Health & Beauty > Protein Powders > Casein Protein

item.g:title: VitaminD3 + K2 Drops - 2000IU D3 with K2 MK-7 - Bone Health - 60 Day Supply
item.g:description: Liquid Vitamin D3 2000IU with Vitamin K2 MK-7 for enhanced calcium absorption. Supports bone health and immunity. Unflavored drops.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements

item.g:title: TriphalaDetox Blend - Amla, Haritaki, Bibhitaki - Gut Health & Detox - 90 Capsules
item.g:description: Classic Ayurvedic Triphala blend with Amla, Haritaki, and Bibhitaki. Gentle daily detox, digestion support, and gut health. Antioxidant rich.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements > Herbal Supplements

item.g:title: GrowTall Kids Calcium+ - Calcium, Vitamin D3, Magnesium - Height & Bone - Vanilla
item.g:description: Complete bone growth formula with 500mg Calcium, Vitamin D3, and Magnesium. Supports height and bone density for kids aged 5-15. Vanilla flavor.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements > Children's Health Supplements
item.g:product_type: Health & Beauty > Kids Nutrition > Calcium Supplement

item.g:title: 30 Days Slimming Kit - Natural Weight Loss Program - Complete Kit
item.g:description: 100% Natural slimming kit for healthy weight loss. Complete 30-day program with nutritional malts and supplements. Includes diet plan guide. No harmful chemicals.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements > Diet & Weight Loss Supplements
item.g:product_type: Health & Beauty > Weight Management > Slimming Kit

item.g:title: 15 Days Slimming Kit - Natural Weight Loss Starter Pack - Complete Program
item.g:description: 100% Natural slimming starter kit for healthy weight loss. Perfect 15-day beginner program with natural ingredients. Easy to follow weight management plan.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements > Diet & Weight Loss Supplements
item.g:product_type: Health & Beauty > Weight Management > Slimming Kit

item.g:title: Sprouted Sathu Maavu Health Mix - Protein Rich Traditional South Indian Health Mix
item.g:description: Traditional South Indian health mix from sprouted grains. The Desi Protein - rich in protein, fiber, and essential nutrients. Easy to prepare nutritious drink.

item.g:product_type: Health & Beauty > Health Mix > Protein Mix

item.g:title: Veg Goat Leg Soup Mix - Mudavattukal Kilangu - Bone & Joint Health - Vegetarian

item.g:title: Nannari Sharbath Syrup - Your Body Coolant - Traditional South Indian Cooling Drink

item.g:product_type: Food & Beverages > Summer Drinks > Cooling Syrup

item.g:title: Nalleru Kaaram Podi - Bone & Joints Strength - Traditional Sesame Spice Powder
item.g:description: Traditional South Indian spice powder made from Nalleru (sesame) with special herbs. Rich in calcium, supports bone and joint health. Perfect with rice and ghee.

item.g:title: Herbal Hair Dye Natural Black - Instant Herbal Hair Color - Chemical Free - 100% Natural
item.g:description: 100% herbal hair dye made from henna, indigo, neem, and hibiscus. Natural black color without chemicals. Covers gray hair and nourishes hair roots.

item.g:title: Dryfruit Laddu Dates Punch - Your Super Snack - Healthy Energy Balls - Pure Cow Ghee
